findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "framefetch_platform_capabilities" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Return a JSON matrix of which data types (metadata, insights, transcript, frames) each supported platform provides — YouTube, YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram …

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.
